description_long: This is a modern, multi-story residential house with a light wood-paneled exterior and a steep gable roof covered in gray shingles. The house features large, rectangular windows, some of which are floor-to-ceiling, providing ample natural light and a contemporary appearance. Two balconies with simple railings are present on one side, enhancing outdoor living space. The structure includes two black chimneys and a concrete foundation, with a dark paved area surrounding the base. The window arrangement is asymmetrical, with some grouped vertically and others spaced apart, contributing to the modern aesthetic. The main entryway is not prominently visible, but the overall design suggests a focus on clean lines and functional outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, multi-story wooden house with a steep gable roof, large windows, and two balconies, set on a concrete base with a dark paved perimeter.
description_view_0: This view shows the rear or side of the house with three vertically stacked windows, two small basement windows, and a partial view of the roof and chimneys.
description_view_1: This angled view highlights the large upper window, one balcony, and the gable roof, offering a glimpse into the interior through the open window.
description_view_2: The front view displays two balconies, three large windows, and a symmetrical arrangement of windows and doors, emphasizing the house's modern facade.
description_view_3: This side view reveals a single large window near the roof, three vertically aligned windows, and a small concrete step, with the gable roof sloping down.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and vertical groupings
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway is understated, likely with a simple door and minimal steps, no prominent porch or decorative columns visible.
